data.name: 我上了老媽的爆乳朋友
data.detailed_description:
长久以来，直树一直暗恋着母亲的好友诗织！一个美丽的女人每晚都来家里，像母亲一样照顾他长大，他怎么会不心动呢？但现在他已经长大成人，对她有了*性*的看法。诗织在他们家的客厅里和妈妈喝酒聊天，那种成熟女人的气质和略带脆弱的气息简直让人无法抗拒。

一天晚上，他们三人边吃边聊，直树的母亲宣布要出差了。但她要求诗织在她离开时关照直树！妈的！他是个成年人了，他不需要别人像照顾小孩一样照顾他，反正大部分时间都是他在照顾母亲！(而且，这完全会妨碍他的计划︰用全新的飞机杯给那个让他想起诗织的最火辣的 AV 女优带来一次又一次的高潮！）。

当诗织和直树向母亲道别时，直树不禁兴奋起来。他已经计划好了自己的*独处*时间，但现在诗织邀请他共进晚餐，还叫他...... 帅哥！也许这*不是*一个单相思的故事......？

受到暗恋对象的赞美后，直树的多巴胺激增，这将是一次永生难忘的体验。就在他向着高潮狂奔的时候，不可思议的事情发生了......每个男人最原始的恐惧成真了...... 直树被他妈妈最好的朋友抓个正着。他的初恋结束了...... 除非......？这只是故事的开始。

  • 日本原版视觉小说的翻译版本

  • 诗织为原版日语对白配音

  • 原画升级为 16:9 和 4:3 高清版本

  • 数小时的故事内容

  • 音频，包括音乐和特效

  • 增强的动画角色

  • 图库和场景选择

  • 在 20 多个令人垂涎欲滴的 H 场景中，将被抓现行的悲惨故事变成最终与梦中情人在一起的故事！

《我上了老妈的爆乳朋友》是由日本传奇开发商 ORCSOFT 制作的视觉小说的英文本地化版本。Cherry Kiss 的目标是为日本以外的玩家提供原汁原味的日本视觉小说体验。

**请注意**

本游戏中描述和直观表现的所有角色均已年满 18 周岁，在本游戏的制作过程中没有使用实际或可识别的未成年人。

data.short_description: 直树终于有了属于自己的房子！他准备好了完美的 "打手枪 "素材，开始了马拉松式的 "打手枪"。他沉轮在性的冲击中，对着妈妈最好的朋友的形象疯狂打手枪，除了这位幻想的"啪啪啪 "对象，还有谁能抓住他的把柄呢？
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version: 10.10+
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

data.name: I Wanna Fuck my Mom's Best Friend
data.detailed_description:
For the longest time, Naoki has been nursing an unrequited crush on Shiori, his mother's best friend! How could he not have fallen for her? A beautiful woman comes to the house every night, taking care of him like a mother would as he grew up, but now that he is an adult, he sees her in a completely new *sexy* light. The mature aura of an older woman and the slight air of vulnerability as Shiori drinks and chats with his mom in their living room is simply irresistible.

One night, the three of them are talking and sharing a meal when Naoki's mother announces she has to leave on a work trip. But she asks Shiori to 'babysit' Naoki while she’s away! He's an adult, dammit! He doesn't need someone to check on him like he’s some kid; he’s the one who looks after his mother most of the time, anyway! (Also, it would totally get in the way of his plans to crank out load after load to the hottest new AV actress who reminds him of Shiori in his brand new Fleshlight!!)

As Shiori and Naoki bid farewell to his mother, Naoki can't help but get excited. He already had his *alone time* planned out, but now Shiori has invited him over for dinner and even calls him... Handsome! Maybe it's *not* a tale of unrequited love...?

Riding the dopamine rush after being complimented by his crush, this will be a session Naoki will never forget. As he races toward his glorious climax, the unthinkable happens... every male's primal fear is realized... Naoki is caught fapping by his mom's best friend! His first love! It’s over… unless…? This is just the beginning of the story.

  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel

  • Shiori is fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue

  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants

  • Hours of story content

  • Audio, including music and special effects

  • Enhanced with animated character sprites

  • Gallery and Scene selections

  • Turn a tragic tale of being caught fapping into finally getting with the woman of your dreams in over 20 mouthwatering H-Scenes!

I Wanna Fuck My Mom's Best Friend is the English localization of a Visual Novel created by legendary Japanese developer ORCSOFT. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

**PLEASE NOTE**

All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: Finally, Naoki has the apartment all to himself! With the perfect fap material ready, he's in for a marathon session. Lost in the sauce, beating it to the image of his mom’s best friend, who else should catch him in the act but the very object of this fapper's fantasy!?
data.supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese
